Auba復出降「魔」？ 阿迪達：視乎情況

【Now Sports】阿仙奴領隊阿迪達表示，奧巴美揚會否於周末對曼聯一戰恢復上陣還是未知之數，指對方情況已比早前好了一點。
阿迪達（Mikel Arteta）周四出席賽前記者會，被追問到奧巴美揚（Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang）會否在周末對曼聯一戰復出時說：「不知道，我昨天跟他溝通過，現時情況看來已好一點，但我們還要等待和視乎情況。」

對有球員將勝利獻給Auba，阿迪達說：「那就是我們經常說，一直希望大家將心比己，當有人遇上困難時，我們要理解和保護他，要獻出我們的愛和在背後支持他，這正正是我們需要做的事。」

其後阿迪達亦有談到新兵奧迪哥特，「他是一位己隊觀察了好一段時間的球員，我們相信其質素是球隊需要的，並可填補不足。現階段我們給他多一點時間，之前他在皇家馬德里效力時未有太多上陣機會，但他很落力訓練，並看來很興奮。周末奧迪哥特會否上陣還是言之過早，要視乎其訓練情況，不要擔心，我們會密切留意。」

'Odegaard has some special qualities that we need'

We wrapped our second loan signing of the January transfer window earlier this week with the addition of Martin Odegaard.

So why was Mikel Arteta so keen to add the Norway international to our midfield - and what are his expectations for him over the coming months?

"He's a player that we followed for some time and we believe that he's got some special qualities that we need, that we have been missing," our manager said.

"Now we have to give him a little bit of time. He hasn't played that many minutes in Madrid but he's been training hard and he looks so excited, as we are, to have another big talent at our club.

"I think in the last few seasons he's progressed and developed in the right way. I've followed him very closely because he played for Real Sociedad, which is my home town. I know him really well.

"I've been really impressed. He's a such a talent. He needs the right environment, he needs a little bit of time but I think he's got the qualities to be a success for us."

So where does Arteta see Odegaard making the most impact in his side?

"He's a specialist to play in the pockets, to play in the No 8 or 10 positions," he said. "He can play off the sides. He's a really creative player who's really comfortable on the ball in tight spaces.

"He has the capacity to create chances and to score goals. Something that he has improved a lot is his workrate without the ball as well, so it's another option to give us more creativity for sure in the final third, and give us more options to set up in different ways against certain teams."
